name: Apple 'n' Honey Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly spray a large cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray or grease lightly.
3. Gently handle the dough to avoid over mixing, which can make the scones tough.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, baking powder, spices (ground cinnamon and ground nutmeg), and salt (if using).
5. Cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
6. Add combined apples, milk, and honey, mixing just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently 5 to 6 times.
8. Pat dough into an 9-inch circle.
9. In a separate bowl, mix together the topping ingredients: wheat germ, ground cinnamon, and sugar.
10. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the dough.
11. Cut the dough into 10 wedges.
12. Place the wedges about 1/2 inch apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
13. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Per serving: 220 calories; 6g protein, 34g carbohydrates, 7g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 210mg sodium.
